subcodes.first_line: O Ali! The world hath been encompassed by heedlessness, and no soul hath attained unto freedom and detachment that it might turn to the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی عالم را غفلت فراگرفته هیچ نفسی بفراغت و آزادی فائز نه تا در امرالله و
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world
